glosses.ja: カセットテープ; ビデオテープ

sentences.target: Tu cherches la cassette sous le lit.
sentences.reading: /ty ʃɛʁʃ la kasɛt su lə li/

translations.fr: Tu cherches la cassette sous le lit.
translations.ipa: /ty ʃɛʁʃ la kasɛt su lə li/
translations.en: You're looking for the cassette under the bed.
translations.es: Estás buscando el casete debajo de la cama.
translations.de: Du suchst die Kassette unter dem Bett.
translations.it: Stai cercando la cassetta sotto il letto.
translations.ko: 너는 침대 밑에서 카세트테이프를 찾고 있어.
translations.pt: Você está procurando a fita cassete embaixo da cama.
translations.he: אתה מחפש את הקלטת מתחת למיטה.
translations.vi: Bạn đang tìm băng cát-xét dưới gầm giường.
translations.ar: أنت تبحث عن شريط الكاسيت تحت السرير.
translations.nl: Je zoekt het cassettebandje onder het bed.
translations.hu: A kazettát keresed az ágy alatt.
translations.hi: तुम बिस्तर के नीचे कैसेट ढूँढ़ रहे हो.
translations.el: Ψάχνεις την κασέτα κάτω από το κρεβάτι.
translations.nb: Du leter etter kassetten under sengen.
translations.id: Kamu sedang mencari kaset di bawah tempat tidur.
translations.sv: Du letar efter kassetten under sängen.
translations.da: Du leder efter kassetten under sengen.
translations.ja: ベッドの下でカセットテープを探している。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; agrees with the finite verb 'cherches'.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; transitive, takes 'la cassette' as direct object and a locative PP 'sous le lit'.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of the direct object noun 'cassette'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'cherches'.
Preposition introducing a spatial complement.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'lit'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'sous'.

sentences.target: On écoute la cassette de Papa.

translations.fr: On écoute la cassette de Papa.
translations.es: Estamos escuchando el casete de papá.
translations.it: Stiamo ascoltando la cassetta di papà.
translations.yue: 我哋喺度聽爸爸嘅錄音帶。
translations.pt: Estamos ouvindo a fita cassete do papai.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang nghe băng cát-xét của bố.
translations.ar: نحن نستمع إلى شريط الكاسيت لأبي.
translations.nl: We luisteren naar het cassettebandje van papa.
translations.hi: हम पापा की कैसेट सुन रहे हैं.
translations.id: Kami sedang mendengarkan kaset milik ayah.
translations.ja: 私たちは父のカセットテープを聴いている。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, morphologically 3rd person singular; colloquially used for 'we'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive, selects 'la cassette' as direct object.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'cassette'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'écoute'.
Preposition marking a nominal complement (possessor/origin) of 'cassette'.
Proper noun (kinship name used as a name), masculine; complement of the preposition 'de'.

translations.en: I want to keep this cassette.
translations.pt: Eu quero guardar esta fita cassete.
translations.he: אני רוצה לשמור את הקלטת הזאת.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn giữ băng cát-xét này.
translations.ar: أريد أن أحتفظ بشريط الكاسيت هذا.
translations.hu: Meg akarom tartani ezt a kazettát.
translations.hi: मैं इस कैसेट को रखना चाहता हूँ.
translations.el: Θέλω να κρατήσω αυτήν την κασέτα.
translations.sv: Jag vill behålla den här kassetten.
translations.ja: このカセットテープをとっておきたい。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; agrees with 'veux'.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; takes an infinitival complement 'garder' (xcomp).
Infinitive verb functioning as the open clausal complement of 'veux'; selects 'cette cassette' as its direct object.
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; modifies 'cassette'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'garder'.

sentences.target: La cassette est coincée dans le magnétoscope.
sentences.reading: /la kasɛt ɛ kwɛ̃se dɑ̃ lə maɲetoskop/

translations.fr: La cassette est coincée dans le magnétoscope.
translations.ipa: /la kasɛt ɛ kwɛ̃se dɑ̃ lə maɲetoskop/
translations.en: The cassette is stuck in the VCR.
translations.es: La cinta VHS está atascada en la videocasetera.
translations.de: Die Kassette steckt im Videorekorder fest.
translations.it: La videocassetta è bloccata nel videoregistratore.
translations.zh-Hans: 录像带卡在录像机里了。
translations.yue: 錄影帶卡住咗喺錄影機入面。
translations.pt: A fita VHS está presa no videocassete.
translations.vi: Băng VHS bị kẹt trong đầu video.
translations.nl: De videoband zit vast in de videorecorder.
translations.hi: वीसीआर में कैसेट फँस गई है.
translations.el: Η κασέτα έχει κολλήσει στο βίντεο.
translations.nb: Kassetten har satt seg fast i videospilleren.
translations.id: Kaset VHS macet di dalam pemutar video.
translations.ro: Caseta VHS s-a blocat în videocasetofon.
translations.ja: ビデオテープがビデオデッキに引っかかっている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of the subject noun 'cassette'.
Common noun, feminine singular; grammatical subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative, 3rd person singular; links the subject to the predicate adjective 'coincée'.
Past participle used adjectivally; feminine singular agreeing with 'cassette'; subject complement (predicate adjective).
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'magnétoscope'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'dans'.
